## 🎯 THIS WEEK'S TOP 3 PRIORITIES

### 1. 🔴 Rio Signing Status — Confirm NOW
Target was April 19 (yesterday). Status is unknown as of this morning. This is the single biggest blocker in the company right now. Every downstream milestone — SEC filing, FindMyShots Inc. incorporation, Q3 revenue targets, SEA exclusivity — is blocked on Rio's signature. If signed: activate Phase 1 onboarding immediately and get Dave in the loop. If not signed: trigger Plan B this week — push to April 26, get Dave involved, parallel organizer outreach, recalculate Q3 to ₱2–2.5M/month.

### 2. 🔴 US Market Readiness — Hard Deadline April 22 (2 days)
Three Chicago organizer meetings are scheduled next week. The team has until Tuesday to have live: US landing page, USD pricing, US payment methods, US timezone handling, and platform testing. This is a tight window. Get a status check from Tim today — either it's done or it's not, and if not, Van needs to make the call on what ships vs. what gets deferred.

### 3. 🟠 Tim Scopes Prepay Integration This Week
This is the Phase 2 unlock — it's what takes FMS from ₱1.1M/month to ₱5.6M/month. Tim hasn't scoped it yet. Even if Rio signed yesterday, the clock on Jul/Aug ship is already running. No more delays on this one — get a scoping session with Tim this week, even a rough estimate, so the risk is quantified.

⚠️ **April is tracking below March** — projected FMS revenue at ~₱448K vs ₱1.1M last month. That's -59% month-over-month. Needs explanation. Could be timing of events (March may have had more large events), or early-month skew. Ask Tim for breakdown. If it's a real slowdown, flag it.

**Conversion note:** 0.79% conversion in April vs 1.24% in March — this is before any Rio Phase 1 impact. Current baseline is weak; reinforces urgency of Rio partnership.

## 🔍 INTELLIGENCE SNAPSHOT

### Competitor Alerts
- **GeoSnapshot** — AI selfie search now CONFIRMED on their platform. FMS's primary tech differentiator over them is neutralized. New message: speed, local fit, exclusivity, mobile app.
- **MarathonFoto** — launched AI facial recognition (March 2026). US market now has face AI too — relevant for the Chicago organizer pitch.
- **JomRun iPix** — new dossier. 53 people, active in MY/ID/SG. No PH presence yet but PH is the obvious next move. Rio signing is the best defense.
- **Manila International Marathon (May 31)** — undefended, 6 weeks out. GeoSnapshot is capable and active. FMS should make a call to the organizer this week.

### Industry Signal
- **Photohawk** (new entrant) + **SportPxl** (EU) = space is heating up. AI is now table stakes across all players.
- **PAL Run Singapore 2026** — PH diaspora race in SG. Potential low-risk soft SEA launch. Flag to Lenli.
- **Terengganu Marathon (Malaysia)** — SEA event worth scoping for Q3 photographer outreach.
